title: Snap-It no longer detecting item count
author: RedFXGit
body:
**Describe the bug**
Using snap-it, irrespective of whether "count items" is toggled on or off, regardless of theme or UI scale, only detects a single item and not the item count. Every item is just counted as 1

**To Reproduce**
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
Open inventory, search "prime" and run Snap-It with "count items" enabled

**Expected behavior**
I expect correct counts to show, where at present only a single copy is detected

**Desktop (please complete the following information):**
 - OS: W10
 - .NET version: 9.0.315
 - Version: WFInfo 9.8.0

title: Overlays dismissed
author: Hsys7272
body: Is this because I only have these visual c++ installed? I already changed my screen to Borderless Fullscreen and turned on Item labels

title: Question:
body:
Hello! Quick question, How/where is the .traineddata from?

E.g. https://github.com/WFCD/WFinfo/blob/libs/tessdata/en.traineddata

Looking online I don't find any existing traineddata files that match that. E.g. https://github.com/tesseract-ocr/tessdata_best/blob/main/eng.traineddata is a lot smaller.

Are these custom tuned models?

Thanks!

title: Request for German language support (de)
author: ghost
body:
Hi team,

I would like to ask if there is interest in adding German language support to WFinfo. Currently, only English and Korean are supported via Tesseract OCR. I am willing to contribute and work on integrating German (de) language support, including providing the necessary `de.traineddata` file and adapting the codebase where needed.

Is German localization and OCR support something the project would welcome? If so, I can start preparing the required changes and submit a pull request.

title: Potential ban possibility
author: PeterParkourMemes
body:
The note on the main page refers to a post from 2017 by a now-retired DE team member.

Can we get an update on the current stance regarding software like this?

I just know there have been many cases of people getting randomly banned for no reason, simply because DE’s anti-cheat flags things at random as potential cheat programs.

title: "Either launch the game from Steam, or put the file steam_appid.txt containing the correct appID in your game folder." when running under Lutris on Linux.
author: TYTheBeast
body:
**Describe the bug**
The app refuses to open despite Steam and Warframe being open, with Warframe running under Lutris. Running the app through Steam yields the line `ERROR: ld.so: object '/home/thomas/.local/share/Steam/ubuntu12_32/gameoverlayrenderer.so' from LD_PRELOAD cannot be preloaded (wrong ELF class: ELFCLASS32): ignored.`

**To Reproduce**
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to Lutris
2. Create a new installed local game, configure WFInfo's Wine prefix and other configs.
3. Start WFInfo through Lutris
4. See error through logs

**Expected behavior**
WFInfo should not check for Steam or Warframe, as Steam isn't Warframe's only platform. This dependency is unnecessary and creates complexity.

**Screenshots**
Attempting to open WFInfo through Steam
![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/0af57e4c-170b-4b8d-b566-c6da7b87d738)

Attempt through Lutris:
![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/54b4041f-3535-4728-a36c-8f67c1baa03f)

**Desktop (please complete the following information):**
 - OS: EndeavourOS
 - .NET version All of them
 - Version v9.6.5

title: Issues trying to login to WFM due to your password including "
author: Minlor
body:
**Describe the bug**
Issues trying to login in to warframe.market if your password includes a " in it.

**To Reproduce**
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to 'Login to WFM'
2. Type in your email and password (password must include a " in it)
3. Click login and you'll get a "Severe issue, server did not understand the request"

**Expected behavior**
It should just log you in since WFM does support " in passwords

**Screenshots**
![WFInfo_65OYHHZp6e](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/75003e70-0763-45a4-9028-59ae2a3fd327)

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

**Desktop (please complete the following information):**
 - OS: W11
 - .NET 4.8
 - v9.6.5

**Additional context**
The only current fix for this solution is to update your password to not include a " in it.

title: [Feature request] Display Arcane prices with snap
author: Aracnoss
body:
**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
With Arcane disolution, it would be nice to see the plat value of arcanes so I can decide if they're more valuable to dissolve or attempt to sell. The snap feature already lets you select on that page, it just displays incorrect items

**Describe the solution you'd like**
Allow the existing snap feature to show Arcane prices from WFMarket

**Additional context**
Screenshot of problem:
![image](https://github.com/WFCD/WFinfo/assets/7039164/54dadc67-947b-448d-9dcc-6661e8170b2b)

title: Remember the warfame.market status
author: dimon222
body: Status on warframe.market isn't preserved across WFInfo launches. It better be.

title: [Feature request] Sell from equipment window
author: rogama25
body:
**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
Would be cool to have a way to start the order creation process from the equipment window, instead of having to search for it

**Describe the solution you'd like**
Some kind of button in the equipment window to sell it. In the window after that, you should be able to input quantity and prices

**Additional context**
You could add a shop icon near to the item, that opens the sell window, adding a quantity textbox that's currently not there
![image](https://github.com/WFCD/WFinfo/assets/11318350/41b0bd91-638c-4ddc-95cb-efe541c6b4ac)

title: For linux user
author: megaUwU-ui
body:
**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
Can't run without Protontricks, Winetricks

**Describe the solution you'd like**
Use Protontricks (winetricks):
- Change Windows version to 10 in winecfg
- Install dotnet48 instead winemono (uninstall)
- Install d3dcompiler_47
- Use wine explorer to run WFinfo exe

**Additional context**
Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.

title: Windows Defender detecting WFInfo as "Trojan:Win32/Bearfoos.A!ml"
author: elieux
body:
**Describe the bug**
Defender says the app is a threat.

**To Reproduce**
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Download wfinfo.zip
2. Wait a bit or try to open it

**Observed behavior**
Defender says wfinfo.exe is a threat called "Trojan:Win32/Bearfoos.A!ml" and blocks it.

**Expected behavior**
Defender lets wfinfo.exe run.

**Screenshots**
![image](https://github.com/WFCD/WFinfo/assets/1399406/27e46446-9459-4b1f-8873-eff678214a9d)

**Desktop:**
 - OS: Windows 11 version 22H2 build 22621.1992
 - Version: 9.6.1

**Additional context**
- Defender security intelligence version: 1.393.1754.0
- Defender security intelligence date: 2023-07-29

title: Create a complete c# Ingame Overlay
author: GreenSkiLLz
body:
Ok so we have so many Windows that you can open with this app. The Main WFInfo window, Relics, Equipment, Settings and the Theme adjuster. There is already an implementation for the overlay function of the Relic screen but why is WFInfo a complete different Window. An Implementation of all the screens, perhaps except the Main WFInfo window, as an in game overlay that you can bring up like the Steam overlay would be appropriate at this point. This would also solve the border less window thing that is recommend to use. With the already used NET and Cs it should be possible without using something like Overlay.NET.
I'm not sure how Warframe Support would handle such a Feature because an external program is one thing but a straight up overlay might be against policy but with the Relic screen not being a problem I think this wouldn't be as well.

title: Add a "Variable Always On Top" option
author: MrGingerManBread
body: I would like an option for the program to force itself and its child windows to be ontop of all other windows ONLY while Warframe is the currently active window. This would allow me to see the relic info on my second monitor but then allow me to flip to a chrome window easily.

title: Add option to remember child window positions and sizes
author: MrGingerManBread
body: Currently, the program remembers where I've left the main window. I would also like the ability for it to remember where I moved and sized the relic and inventory windows.

title: [Feature request] an option to have a ducat list
author: Neihel
body:
I request that a new button gets added where instead of placing items on the market you can put them on the ducat bin
I always forget which items I intend to convert into ducats
